name: steps
title: Steps
description: Numbered progress rail — vertical for agent task logs, horizontal for wizards.

files.content:
Numbered progress rail — vertical for agent task logs, horizontal for wizards.

```jsx
<Steps current={1} items={[
  { title: 'Upload', description: '3 files received' },
  { title: 'Convert' },
  { title: 'Download' },
]} orientation="horizontal" />
```
